injuries.comment: Jones isn't expected to play against Colorado on Sunday (Jan. 4), as per George Richards of Florida Hockey Now reports.
Brindley did not play in Saturday's (Jan. 3) game against the Carolina.
Kiviranta didn't accompany the Avalanche on the team's three-game road trip, which begins against Carolina on Saturday (Jan. 3), as per Corey Masisak of The Denver Post.
